titleStmt.title: SII 38.426: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 426. (A.R. No. 426 of 1912.) VAḺUVŪR, MAYAVARAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the north wall, maṇḍapa, in front of the central shrine, Vīraṭṭanēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Jaṭāvarmaṉ Tribhuvana-Sundara Pāṇḍya (II) Year 5: Makara, su. di. Wednesday Sōdi = Wednesday, 30th December 1276 A.D. However, the year is 6.

summary.p: Damaged in several places. The inscription records that the mahāsabhaiyār of Vaḻugūr, a brahmadēyam in Tiruveḻundūr-nāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu sold a piece of land to the temple on the order of Ādichaṇḍēśura dēvar of the Tiruvīraṭṭānamuḍaiyār temple of the above village. The inscription then recounts the history of this land. It appears a person •••• ppalaṅkuḍaiyāṉ cultivated the land for three years but failed to remit land tax (kaḍamai) to the sabhā and absconded. The land of a certain Nālūrppaṟṟuppiriyaṉ, who had stood surety to the defaulter for the remittance of kaḍamai, was sold to the temple for 68 kāśu to make up the loss of the tax. Other details are not clear on account of the damaged nature of the record. The madhyastha of the sabhā wrote the deed.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koṟcaṭapaṉmar tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ ciṟicun
tarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 5 makaranāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣa
ttu putaṉkiḻamaiyu peṟṟa cotināḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻavaḷa
nāṭṭu tiruveḻuntūrnāṭ brahmateyam vaḻukūr mahāsapaiyom
Ivvūr Uṭaiyār tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyār koyil Ā
ticaṇṭecuratevar tiruaruḷāl Iṉnāyaṉār koyiltāṉattāṟku
nāṅkaḷ nilavilai paṇṇikku paricāvatu
�ppalaṅkuṭaiyāṉ muṉṟāvatuvaraiy payiṟceytu Ūruṭaṉe kūṭṭikkaṭamai
Iṟukkacite Ivaṉ ciyai kaṭamaiiṟāte Oṭippokaiyil Ivaṉ peṟkuā nāṅkaḷ
ruṭaiyāṉ nālūrpaṟṟuppiriyaṉ cikai Uḷvarippaṭi paṇattukku
Ūril muṉṉiṉṟu Iraippuṇaik kaṭamai Iṟuppittu ka ḷ kai
pe veṉtāḷi ṉi nilattu nāṅ
kaḷ viṟṟuk kuṭutta tiru l vatikku meṟku cirāmavākkālukku vaṭakkuk
kacattu kuṇa kaḷ Uṭpaṭa maṉaiiruppu Eṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa »
ku kiḻpāṟkellai Uṭciṟu vākkālukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai
koḷ ṉṟāṉ Iṉta nilattukkum kuṭumpaṉcey nilattukkum vaṭakkum mel pā
vākkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai viṟki
ṉṟāṉ nilattukku teṟkum Āka Inṉāṉku Ellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa » � 10kāṇiyum cāṇik
kuṇṭu Eṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilattukkuk kiḻpāṟkellai Uṭciṟuvāk
ku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai tiruñāṉacampantaṉmaṭappuṟattukku teṟkum vaṭapāṟkellai
Āṟṟuṭaiyāṉ nilattukku teṟku Āka Icainta Iṉṉāṉku Ellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa » 4 10 4 pa � » »
ntanma� ṉilam �kkāle mukkāṇi Araikkāṇikku Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉ
ṟāṭu naṟkāciṉāl ø6 10 8 Ippaṇam Aṟupatteṭṭukkum viṟṟuk kuṭuttu Ippaṇamum Iṉṉāyar
Eḻuti Aruḷukiṟa tiruvāparaṇa Aṟaviṭṭuk � Akalattu Iṭuvittuk koṇṭu nilavilaip
piramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttu tāṉattāṟku vaḻakūr mahāsapaiyom paṇiyāl Iv
vūr maddhyastan niyamataṉ kavuṭaiyāṉ nāṉūṟṟuvappiriyaṉ
Digital edition of SII 38.426 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
